raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "19% of respondents in a survey of nearly 40,000 students at 57 community colleges experienced homelessness in the previous year.",
    "The extrapolated number of community college students in California who have experienced homelessness in the last year is nearly 400,000.",
    "AB 302 will allow community college students to stay in designated areas safely overnight without criminalization.",
    "AB 302 requires community colleges to provide accessible bathroom facilities for homeless students using overnight parking.",
    "AB 302 aims to connect homeless students with available housing, food, and financial assistance resources.",
    "Student homelessness among community college students is a crisis that requires immediate action."
  ]
}
```
